question: Which of the following BEST describes the purpose of a test oracle?
options: A tool used to generate test data and populate test environments automatically
A source of information used to determine whether a test has passed or failed
A document that describes the overall test strategy for a project
A person responsible for reviewing and approving test cases before execution
explanation: FL - A test oracle is any mechanism — human, document, system, or algorithm — that provides the expected outcome against which actual test results are compared, allowing a tester to determine whether a test has passed or failed.
